message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first MetricsServer start in ft watch (tick 276)

Migrates the metrics HTTP server bootstrap in `ft watch` (main.rs
L15324) to the cx-first sibling `MetricsServer::start_with_cx`:

- `server.start().await` → `server.start_with_cx(&metrics_cx).await`

The metrics server is optionally enabled per config and exposes Prometheus
scraping + health endpoints. Starting it involves a socket bind +
background accept loop spawn. The `_with_cx` variant (metrics.rs L519)
threads cx through the initial bind/configure steps before spawning the
accept loop — so a cx-cancel during the brief startup window cleanly
aborts the bind rather than leaving a half-initialized server.

The bind itself is fast; the real value here is consistency with the
rest of the ft watch bootstrap path (which threads Cx through
observation runtime start, IPC listen, watchdog spawn, etc).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean.

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 90 (187-276).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 153 sites (152 before + 1).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 45 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
